task_description: Execute Phase 12 (Creator Economy, Payments, Monetization) and Phase 13 (Moderation, Trust, Safety, Compliance) of the Quant Ecosystem autonomous build plan. Add fraud detection, ad billing, agent spending limits, and dispute handling to payments. Add abuse graph, spam detection, AI output safety, ad policy enforcement, bot detection, content labels, and safety audit logs to moderation.

verification.summary: All gates pass: typecheck 72/72, build 51/51, test 75/75, lint 61/61. Payments package has 222 tests (81 new for fraud/ad-billing/agent-limits/disputes). Moderation package has 178 tests (96 new for abuse-graph/spam/ai-safety/ad-policy/bot-detection/labels/audit-log). Tests exercise real logic paths and would fail if services were reverted.
